title: Romantic Pungent Greek Honey and Phyllo Baklava
description: A crispy, sweet, and savory Greek dessert featuring the flavors of honey, phyllo, and bacon. Perfect for a romantic evening or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Bacon
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced, crispy bacon adds a smoky flavor to the baklava.

ingredients.name: Pistachios
ingredients.notes: Chopped pistachios add a nice crunch and flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh thyme
ingredients.notes: Fresh thyme adds a fragrant, herbaceous flavor.

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Good quality, pure honey is essential for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Greek yogurt
ingredients.notes: Unsweetened Greek yogurt adds a tangy flavor.

ingredients.name: Cinnamon
ingredients.notes: Ground cinnamon adds warmth and depth.

ingredients.name: Ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: Ground cardamom adds a unique, aromatic flavor.

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: Beaten egg is used to brush phyllo dough.

ingredients.name: Melted butter
ingredients.notes: Melted butter is used to brush phyllo dough.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Water is used to help dissolve honey.

instructions: Unroll the phyllo dough and cut it into 1-inch squares.
In a large skillet, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy. Set aside.
In a separate skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter and add the thyme, cinnamon, and cardamom. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the pistachios to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and water.
Brush the phyllo squares with the egg mixture, then layer them in a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter in between each layer.
Sprinkle the pistachio mixture over the top layer of phyllo.
Drizzle the honey over the top of the baklava, making sure to cover the entire surface.
Bake the baklava for 35 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
